analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e feature naming and structure. Fighting Styles are typically introduced at low levels.
analysis.quality: High. The description is clear, concise, and accurately reflects the source material's intent (granting a choice of specialization at 2nd level).
analysis.mechanics: This feature grants a permanent choice of a benefit ('Fighting Style'). The mechanic is sound, providing early specialization. The restriction preventing taking the same style twice is noted, which is standard.
suggested_improvements: For complete archival quality, the specific list of available Fighting Styles should ideally be referenced or included, although this single JSON entry focuses only on the feature granting mechanism.

archival_summary.name: Fighting Style
archival_summary.notes: Grants the Paladin the ability to select one Fighting Style option. Standard early-game choice feature.
